en: From the blue and purple and scarlet yarns they made finely woven garments, for ministering in the Holy Place. They made the holy garments for Aaron, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 他們用藍色紫色朱紅色線做彩衣，在聖所供職時穿著；又照著耶和華吩咐摩西的，為亞倫做聖衣。

en: He made the ephod of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen.
zh: 又用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做以弗得。

en: And they hammered out gold leaf, and he cut it into threads to work into the blue and purple and the scarlet yarns, and into the fine twined linen, in skilled design.
zh: 他們把金子錘成薄片，剪成細線，用巧工織在藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻之中。

en: They made for the ephod attaching shoulder pieces, joined to it at its two edges.
zh: 又為以弗得做相連的肩帶，把以弗得的兩端連接起來。

en: And the skillfully woven band on it was of one piece with it and made like it, of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 上面的帶子，做法好像以弗得一樣，與以弗得連在一起，都用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做的，是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: They made the onyx stones, enclosed in settings of gold filigree, and engraved like the engravings of a signet, according to the names of the sons of Israel.
zh: 他們預備了兩塊紅瑪瑙寶石，鑲嵌在金槽裡，又用刻圖章的方法刻上以色列眾子的名字，

en: And he set them on the shoulder pieces of the ephod to be stones of remembrance for the sons of Israel, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 把這兩塊寶石放在以弗得的兩條肩帶上，作以色列人的記念石，是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He made the breastpiece, in skilled work, in the style of the ephod, of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen.
zh: 他又用巧設的圖案手工做胸牌，像做以弗得一樣，用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做的。

en: It was square. They made the breastpiece doubled, a span its length and a span its breadth when doubled.
zh: 胸牌是正方形的；他們把胸牌做成雙層，長二十二公分，寬二十二公分，是雙層的。

en: And they set in it four rows of stones. A row of sardius, topaz, and carbuncle was the first row;
zh: 又把四行寶石鑲在上面，一行是紅寶石、黃玉、翡翠，這是第一行。

en: and the second row, an emerald, a sapphire, and a diamond;
zh: 第二行是綠寶石、藍寶石、金鋼石。

en: and the third row, a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;
zh: 第三行是黃瑪瑙、白瑪瑙、紫晶。

en: and the fourth row, a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper. They were enclosed in settings of gold filigree.
zh: 第四行是水蒼玉、紅瑪瑙、碧玉；這些寶石都是鑲在金槽裡。

en: There were twelve stones with their names according to the names of the sons of Israel. They were like signets, each engraved with its name, for the twelve tribes.
zh: 這些寶石代表以色列眾子的名字，共有十二塊；用刻圖章的方法，每塊刻上一個名字，十二塊代表十二個支派。

en: And they made on the breastpiece twisted chains like cords, of pure gold.
zh: 又在胸牌上用純金做鍊子，像擰繩子一般做成。

en: And they made two settings of gold filigree and two gold rings, and put the two rings on the two edges of the breastpiece.
zh: 又做兩個金槽和兩個金環，把兩個金環安放在胸牌的兩端，

en: And they put the two cords of gold in the two rings at the edges of the breastpiece.
zh: 把那兩條金繩穿在胸牌兩端的環子裡；

en: They attached the two ends of the two cords to the two settings of filigree. Thus they attached it in front to the shoulder pieces of the ephod.
zh: 又把金繩的另兩端接在兩槽上，再把它們連在以弗得前面的肩帶上。

en: Then they made two rings of gold, and put them at the two ends of the breastpiece, on its inside edge next to the ephod.
zh: 他又做兩個金環，安放在胸牌的兩端，在胸牌的兩邊，就是在以弗得裡面的邊上。

en: And they made two rings of gold, and attached them in front to the lower part of the two shoulder pieces of the ephod, at its seam above the skillfully woven band of the ephod.
zh: 他又做兩個金環，安放在以弗得前面兩條肩帶的下邊，靠近相連的地方，在以巧工做成的以弗得的肩帶上面。

en: And they bound the breastpiece by its rings to the rings of the ephod with a lace of blue, so that it should lie on the skillfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastpiece should not come loose from the ephod, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 他們用藍色細帶子把胸牌繫住，就是把胸牌的環子和以弗得的環子繫在一起，使胸牌可以貼在以巧工織成的以弗得的帶子上，免得胸牌從以弗得上脫落，這是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: He also made the robe of the ephod woven all of blue,
zh: 又做以弗得的外袍，是織成的，全件是藍色的。

en: and the opening of the robe in it was like the opening in a garment, with a binding around the opening, so that it might not tear.
zh: 在外袍的中間有一領口，如同戰袍的領口，領口的周圍有領邊，免得領口破裂。

en: On the hem of the robe they made pomegranates of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen.
zh: 又在外袍的底邊上，用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做石榴。

en: They also made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates all around the hem of the robe, between the pomegranates-
zh: 他又用純金做鈴鐺，把金鈴安放在石榴中間，就是安放在外袍周圍底邊上的石榴中間：

en: a bell and a pomegranate, a bell and a pomegranate around the hem of the robe for ministering, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 一個金鈴，一個石榴，一個金鈴，一個石榴，在外袍周圍的底邊上，在供職時穿用；都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: They also made the coats, woven of fine linen, for Aaron and his sons,
zh: 他又用織成的細麻布替亞倫和他的兒子做內袍，

en: and the turban of fine linen, and the caps of fine linen, and the linen undergarments of fine twined linen,
zh: 並且用細麻做禮冠，用細麻做頭巾，用撚的細麻做細麻布褲子，

en: and the sash of fine twined linen and of blue and purple and scarlet yarns, embroidered with needlework, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 以及用撚的細麻和藍色紫色朱紅色線，用刺繡的手工做腰帶；都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: They made the plate of the holy crown of pure gold, and wrote on it an inscription, like the engraving of a signet, "Holy to the LORD."
zh: 他們用純金做聖冠上的牌子，又用刻圖章的方法，在上面刻著“歸耶和華為聖”的字樣。

en: And they tied to it a cord of blue to fasten it on the turban above, as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 又用一條藍色細帶子把牌子繫住，繫在禮冠的上面，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: Thus all the work of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting was finished, and the people of Israel did according to all that the LORD had commanded Moses; so they did.
zh: 於是，帳幕，就是會幕的一切工程都完成了；凡是耶和華吩咐摩西的，以色列人都照著作了；這樣，他們就作完了會幕的一切工程。

en: Then they brought the tabernacle to Moses, the tent and all its utensils, its hooks, its frames, its bars, its pillars, and its bases;
zh: 他們把帳幕、會幕和會幕的一切器具都帶到摩西那裡，就是鉤子、木板、橫閂、柱子、柱座、

en: the covering of tanned rams' skins and goatskins, and the veil of the screen;
zh: 染紅公山羊皮的蓋、海狗皮的蓋和遮蓋至聖所的幔子、

en: the ark of the testimony with its poles and the mercy seat;
zh: 法櫃、櫃槓和施恩座，

en: the table with all its utensils, and the bread of the Presence;
zh: 桌子、桌子上的一切器具和陳設餅，

en: the lampstand of pure gold and its lamps with the lamps set and all its utensils, and the oil for the light;
zh: 純金的燈臺與燈盞，就是擺列在燈臺上的燈盞和燈臺上的一切器具，以及點燈用的油；

en: the golden altar, the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the entrance of the tent;
zh: 金壇、膏油、芬芳的香和會幕的門簾；

en: the bronze altar, and its grating of bronze, its poles, and all its utensils; the basin and its stand;
zh: 銅壇、壇上的銅網、壇槓、壇上的一切器具、洗濯盆和盆座；

en: the hangings of the court, its pillars, and its bases, and the screen for the gate of the court, its cords, and its pegs; and all the utensils for the service of the tabernacle, for the tent of meeting;
zh: 院子的幔幕、柱子、柱座、院子的門簾、繩子、釘子和帳幕，以及會幕一切使用的器具；

en: the finely worked garments for ministering in the Holy Place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons for their service as priests.
zh: 在聖所供職用的彩衣、祭司亞倫的聖衣和他兒子供祭司職的衣服。

en: According to all that the LORD had commanded Moses, so the people of Israel had done all the work.
zh: 這一切工作，耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西，以色列人就怎樣作。

en: And Moses saw all the work, and behold, they had done it; as the LORD had commanded, so had they done it. Then Moses blessed them.
zh: 摩西查看了一切工作，見他們所作的，完全是耶和華吩咐的，就給他們祝福。
